{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = White Fox boundary flags
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[White Fox boundary flags]] are treasures stolen by [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
